texto: There will always be a place for us somewhere, somehow, as long as we see to it that working people fight for everything they have, everything they hope to get, for dignity, equality, democracy, to oppose war and to bring to the world a better life.
explicacao: Citação de Harry Bridges sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There will always be a place for us somewhere, somehow, as long as we see to it that working peop…” articula vida, esperanca, war em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e esperanca.
